scripts.contracts: node tools/contracts/generate-cli-result.mjs && node tools/contracts/generate-desktop-host.mjs && node tools/contracts/generate-presentation-events.mjs && node tools/contracts/generate-operability.mjs && node tools/contracts/generate-capabilities.mjs
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @ludivra/presentation-protocol build && pnpm --filter @ludivra/platform-contracts build && pnpm --filter @ludivra/runtime-web build && pnpm --filter @ludivra/renderer-three build
scripts.build:web: pnpm build:packages && pnpm build:wasm && pnpm --filter @ludivra/browser-host build
scripts.build: pnpm build:cli && pnpm build:packages && pnpm build:native
scripts.test:wasm-equivalence: pnpm build:native && pnpm build:wasm && pnpm --filter @ludivra/runtime-web build && node tools/tests/wasm-equivalence.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm build && pnpm test:cli && pnpm test:desktop && pnpm test:native && pnpm test:wasm-equivalence
